name: pencil-diff
description: Differential diagnostic suite for the Pencil profile. Each test starts from a Pencil baseline and toggles ONE thing (a persona on/off, debug-colors enable, etc.) then screenshots. Comparing adjacent screenshots isolates each layer's pixel contribution — the standard technique for figuring out which layer produces which pixels when the composed image is ambiguous. Use this when the Pencil look has artifacts and you can't tell from a single image whether they're from the shader, the grid, the halos, the sockets, or somewhere else. Compare result images side-by-side in C:/Repos/Canary/workloads/qualia/results/ after a run.
